Program_Description: The Tehama County WIC program helps families throughout Tehama County eat well, stay healthy, and be active.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children under 5
Eligibility_Requirements: If you receive Medi-Cal, CalWORKS or CalFresh (Food Stamps), you could meet the income eligibility for WIC.
Application_Process: Please call our office at (530) 527-8791 to enroll or certify.

Program_Description: Healthy Families Tehama aims to build and strengthen nurturing parent-child relationships and promote healthy childhood growth and development.
Target_Population: Pregnant individuals or families with a new baby (less than 3 months old) living in Tehama County.
Eligibility_Requirements: No income requirements for the program.

Program_Description: Healthy Beginnings assists families through support, empowerment, and education, providing preventative and support services.
Target_Population: Pregnant individuals or families with a child less than one year old, or a child with medical needs living in Tehama County.
Eligibility_Requirements: No income requirements for the program.

Program_Description: A program that provides parent educator home visits.
Target_Population: Expectant parents and families with children from birth through age 3 (or 5 in some cases).
